latest.title: How Hormones Shape Sexual Orientation & Behavior | Dr. Marc Breedlove
latest.desc: Dr. Marc Breedlove, PhD, is a professor of neuroscience at Michigan State University and an expert on how hormones shape brain development and sexual orientation. We discuss how prenatal testosterone impacts whether someone is romantically attracted to men or women later in life, and what correlates of sexual orientation — such as finger-length ratios — tell us about the role of hormones in brain

latest.title: Molly Bloom: Power, Overcoming Fear, & The Darkness of Human Nature
latest.desc: Molly Bloom is the real-life inspiration behind the Oscar-nominated film Molly’s Game. She built and ran the most exclusive high-stakes underground poker game in the world, attended by celebrities, billionaires, and powerful figures.
